description: Get dressed in these T-strap sandals from catwalk for a wonderful casual look. The wooden beads lend a dose of chic to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Synthetic strap in a T-strap design for comfort Wooden beads on the forefoot strap for added style Leather strap around the ankle with an elastic strap on the front for a snug Fit Leather lining for the back of the ankle strap for all day comfort Midsole Wooden look footbed for added style and durability Outsole TPU outsole with textured finish on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
